COMPLIANCE

Maping Curriculum According NEP2020

What We Do

SARKIT EdTech turns curiosity into capability through experiential STEM ecosystems, intelligent lab infrastructures, future-focused kits, and immersive simulations, enabling learners and institutions to build, innovate, and lead confidently in a rapidly evolving technological world.

Design Future Labs

Conceptualizing intelligent STEM environments with modular robotics stations, immersive AI zones and innovation pods.

Develop STEM Curriculum

Industry mapped programs aligned with NEP vision, emerging technologies and practical engineering workflows.

Deploy Innovation Kits

Robotics, IoT, UAV and AI kits designed for hands-on experimentation and rapid prototyping.

Enable Research & Startups

Supporting incubation culture, interdisciplinary research and student innovation ecosystems.

Future-Ready
Lab Infrastructure

Modular STEM ecosystems engineered for high-impact research and immersive learning.
